failedAssertions.reason: At 768×1024 layout stacks correctly and has no overflow, but horizontal padding is 20px per side instead of required 16px.
Nav tab fonts/colors are correct and hover changes color, but hover transition is not smooth because computed transition-duration is 0s.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated API healthcheck to port-listener check because /health was intermittently rate-limited (429) during validation setup.
Added testing notes for /health rate-limit behavior and exact-text selector guidance for validating the Explore nav item.
